mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (id, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, type, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{read}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET is_read = TRUE WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
